title: pimpinella saxifraga subsp. alpestris
intro: Pimpinella saxifraga subsp. alpestris, also known as alpine burnet, is a subspecies of the burnet plant, which is a flowering plant in the carrot family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of alpine burnet include its ability to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage. Alpine burnet is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
